examples: The simile is there ostensibly to compare Satan with the great sea beast, leviathan.
The rusting hulk was sold by Ukraine in 1998 to a Hong Kong—Macau trading company—ostensibly to be transformed into a floating casino.
Ostensibly, people would then spend more reasonably.
That law bans adoptions by Americans ostensibly because of documented cases of abuse by adoptive parents.
It suggests that decisions to ostensibly protect American jobs may actually cost American lives.
